content: Hey Hayeong! Hope things are going good. I have another task I need help testing on. I was wondering if you could do a search on the top 10 ground types of ground type pokemon in pokemon go for raids and pvp master league and add it to my task list to review later. That would be great.

Sure thing, James! I’ll gather information on the top 10 Ground-type Pokémon in Pokémon GO for raids and PvP Master League. I’ll make sure to include details on their stats, movesets, and effectiveness in both formats. I’ll add this to your task list for you to review later.

Anything specific you want me to focus on while I’m researching?

Also, do you need this information sent to your email or should I just add it to your task list for you to review here?
Great Hayeong, thank you. By the way are you doing alright?
Yeah you can just add it to the task list for now and ill review it later.

Got it, James. I’ll add the search for the top 10 Ground-type Pokémon in Pokémon GO for raids and PvP Master League to your task list. You can review it whenever you’re ready.

If you need anything else or have other tasks in mind, just let me know. How are you doing today?
